commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed for refreshed exact-head proof, pending checks, and broad config/SDK/channel contract approval; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.; Cleared: Cleared: no concrete security or supply-chain regression was found in the sampled diff; the network-adjacent edits continue using fetchWithSsrFGuard and no new dependency, workflow permission, or lifecycle hook... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared scoped mention-pattern policy, exposes it through config and plugin SDK schemas, wires it through bundled channel runtimes, and updates docs, generated metadata, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The relevant review path is source review, exact-head CI, and real behavior proof for the new policy.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for refreshed exact-head proof, pending checks, and broad config/SDK/channel contract approval; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.
